handoff.reason: Six-phase strict-phased WO authored from file:line-verified gap analysis; ready for phase-1 execution behind a per-phase hard stop.

execution_rules: STRICT PHASED: execute one phase, then HARD STOP + report + await operator go. Never roll into the next phase automatically.
Each phase's FIRST task (T1) READS the named target files before any authoring — no fix scoped from a count alone.
Additive only on the MCP surface: the existing 11 tools + their response shapes must not regress.
hard_constraints: Ollama local-only — no cloud LLM/embedding keys; no OpenAI/Anthropic as required defaults.
main-only git: commit by EXPLICIT path, never git add -A; .coderef/ stays gitignored.
No close-workorder bypass: no --force; SKIP_COMMIT_CONTENT_CHECK forbidden.
P5 must not enable the existing IncrementalCache on populate without the persisted-full-symbol-table fix (cross-file corruption trap).

decisions_log.reason: six independent capability areas of escalating effort; per-phase hard stop

cleanest import/call model of the four graph-dead languages
agent-native bar first; cross-repo + scored graph-eval are a separate track
